description: ldap3 is a pure-Python LDAP v3 client. Strictly RFC compliant. Useful for AD recon, ldap injection, etc.

documentation.example: from ldap3 import Server, Connection, ALL; c = Connection(Server('10.0.0.5', get_info=ALL), 'cn=admin,dc=example,dc=com', 'PASS', auto_bind=True); c.search('dc=example,dc=com', '(objectClass=*)')

metadata.example: from ldap3 import Server, Connection, ALL; c = Connection(Server('10.0.0.5', get_info=ALL), 'cn=admin,dc=example,dc=com', 'PASS', auto_bind=True); c.search('dc=example,dc=com', '(objectClass=*)')

name: ldap3
